pr1.description: PR #1 spiritvale-site — merge/close decision for news page
pr1.dead_window_reason: EA launch dead window Jun 22–Jul 15. No patch expected; no further Telegram alerts until window closes or steam_version > v0.18.0.
pr1.archived_reason: Original deadline 2026-06-08 expired 12d ago; 22 Telegram escalations sent with zero response. PR is pre-classified + merge-ready. Boss to decide merge vs close at EA launch (2026-07-15). Archived to stop daily EXPIRED escalation.
pr1.pr_title: feat(news): publish /news page — SpiritVale official release date announcement
pr1.pr_scope: Adds /news page covering Demo Jun 12 (already launched) + EA Jul 15 (upcoming). Draft source: patches/drafts/announcement-spiritvale-official-date-release.json
pr1.next_review_reason: EA (Early Access) launch date — boss decides merge vs close at that milestone
